page_metadata.biotools__summary: BPM-Matlab is a numerical simulation tool to efficiently model electric field propagation in a wide variety of optical fiber geometries with arbitrary refractive index profiles even in the presence of bending.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: BPM-Matlab is a numerical simulation tool to efficiently model electric field propagation in a wide variety of optical fiber geometries with arbitrary refractive index profiles even in the presence of bending.
